meaning: n.灌溉的人,灌溉车,灌注器
examples: Abstract: Objective to explore the effect of oral irrigator on the periodontal health of the crown bridge prosthesis.
Objective to evaluate the therapeutic efficacy of Oral Irrigator in treatment of gingivitis in the bridge of prosthesis.
Present, the major products are the Medical Pulse Irrigator, Automatic Hypothermia Instrument and Vibrating Expectoration Machines etc.
